candidate_summary: RAVINALA orthogonal basin-stable KV reserve: augment standard KV cache with secondary orthogonal reserve-basin via low-rank decomposition (I - Proj_U) on evicted tokens; rehydration on retrieval via projection sum primary_KV approx Proj_U(prior) + reserve_KV. Three recombined components: orthogonal decomposition + reserve basin for evicted tokens + projection-sum rehydration.

verdict_sentence: RAVINALA orthogonal basin-stable KV reserve fails novelty: 8/8 retrieved results hit by rule (0 kw / 8 sem / 6 func), with KVReviver (arxiv 2512.17917) acting as an exact functional twin (sem 0.94, func 0.95) for reversible KV cache compression with sketch-based reconstruction, and ReCalKV/KVzip/KVSculpt/KeepKV/Cache-What-Lasts forming a multi-cluster prior-art neighborhood spanning low-rank decomposition, reconstruction-driven eviction, and retention/rehydration of evicted KV state — far exceeding the threshold_for_fail=1.
